properties.name: success-text
properties.description: The success text for the form element.

properties.name: error-text
properties.description: The error text for the form element.

properties.name: helper-text
properties.description: The helper text for the form element.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The label for the form element.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Sets the element's disabled state. A disabled element will not be included during form submission.

properties.name: initial-value
properties.description: The initial value of the form. This value sets the `value` property only when the `value` property has not been explicitly set.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The current value of the element. This property serves as a mechanism to set the `value` property through both property assignment and the .setAttribute() method. This is useful for setting the field's value in UI libraries that bind data through the .setAttribute() API and don't support IDL attribute binding.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the element. This element's value will be surfaced during form submission under the provided name.

properties.name: required
properties.description: Require the field to be completed prior to form submission.

properties.name: default-checked
properties.description: Provides the default checkedness of the input element

properties.name: checked
properties.description: The current checkedness of the element. This property serves as a mechanism to set the `checked` property through both property assignment and the .setAttribute() method. This is useful for setting the field's checkedness in UI libraries that bind data through the .setAttribute() API and don't support IDL attribute binding.

properties.name: indeterminate
properties.description: Indicates whether a checkbox is in an indeterminate state.

properties.name: connotation
properties.description: The connotation the checklist should have.

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: When true, the control will be immutable by user interaction. See https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/readonly HTML attribute for more information.

events.name: input
events.description: Emitted when the checked state changes.

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted when the checked state changes.

slots.name: default
slots.description: The default slot allows you to use rich content as the checkbox's label.

slots.name: helper-text
slots.description: Describes how to use the checkbox. Alternative to the `helper-text` attribute.
